name: User Authentication System
description: Implement comprehensive user authentication with JWT tokens, password hashing, session management, and OAuth integration.

name: Payment Processing Integration
description: Add Stripe payment integration with webhook support, transaction tracking, refund handling, and invoice generation.

name: Real-time Notifications System
description: Implement WebSocket-based real-time notifications with database persistence and UI updates.

name: Admin Dashboard
description: Create a comprehensive admin dashboard with analytics, user management, and system monitoring.

name: API Rate Limiting and Monitoring
description: Implement API rate limiting, request throttling, and monitoring with Redis caching.
